bird.summary: The moustached kingfisher (Actenoides bougainvillei), also called Bougainville moustached kingfisher, is a species of bird in the family Al…

relations.subject: Moustached kingfisher
relations.evidence: An estimated 1,300–7,000 mature individuals are left. Their natural habitats are subtropical or tropical, moist, lowland forests and subtropical or tropical, moist, montane forests; they nest in tree holes
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Moustached kingfisher
relations.evidence: They are threatened by habitat loss and introduced predators
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
